subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud, Mahmud! A hundred times welcome! Praise be to God, in all circumstances thou art enabled to serve at the Threshold of Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمود محمود مرحبا صد مرحبا الحمد لله در جمیع مواقع موفق بعبودیت آستان بها
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @petitions to authorities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat]
